title: On the origins of oxygenic photosynthesis and aerobic respiration in Cyanobacteria
author_string: Soo, Rochelle M., Hemp, James, Parks, Donovan H., Fischer, Woodward W., Hugenholtz, Philip
publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)
abstract: Oxygen-producing photosynthesis and oxygen-consuming respiration evolved after the divergence of the main lineages of blue-green algae.
